fact: Nous Research positions itself as an American open-source AI organization training language models and distributed training infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: train world-class open source language models and build infrastructure

fact: Its stated mission connects open-source language models with human rights, freedoms, unrestricted availability, and understanding.
evidence_excerpt: advance human rights and freedoms by creating and proliferating open source language models

fact: Research focus areas include model architecture, data synthesis, fine-tuning, and reasoning.
evidence_excerpt: model architecture, data synthesis, fine-tuning, and reasoning

fact: The release portfolio spans agents, models, datasets, frameworks, training infrastructure, papers, and simulators.
evidence_excerpt: AGENT ... MODEL ... DATASET ... FRAMEWORK ... TRAINING ... PAPER ... SIMULATOR

fact: Hermes Agent is an MIT-licensed autonomous agent that runs on the user's server with persistent memory.
evidence_excerpt: Open Source ... MIT License ... autonomous agent that lives on your server

fact: Hermes Agent supports multiple communication platforms, scheduled automations, subagents, sandboxing, and browser control.
evidence_excerpt: Persistent memory ... Scheduled Automations ... Delegates & Parallelizes ... Real Sandboxing

fact: Psyche is described as open infrastructure democratizing AI development.
Recent releases include Hermes Agent, NousCoder-14B, Nomos 1, and Hermes 4.3 Seed.
Current research publishing covers neuron attribution, efficient attention and pretraining, programming models, RL frameworks, and decentralized training.
evidence_excerpt: Model Neuroscience ... Lighthouse Attention ... Efficient pretraining ... NousCoder-14B

fact: Many Nous outputs link to public Hugging Face, GitHub, and paper artifacts rather than conventional paid-plan pricing.
